description_long: This is a stylized police car with a compact, angular body and exaggerated features, including oversized rear wheels and a sloped metallic roof. The front of the vehicle is equipped with prominent exhaust pipes extending outward, and the body is primarily black with metallic and white accents. Police insignia and shield emblems are visible on the side doors, and a small red emergency light is mounted on the roof. The rear of the car features two red tail lights but no visible license plate. The overall design is reminiscent of a hot rod or custom patrol car, blending classic police motifs with a unique, aggressive stance.
description: A stylized, compact police car with oversized rear wheels, metallic roof, side police insignia, and a red emergency light on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide stance, exposed suspension, and prominent exhaust pipes extending from the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped metallic roof, large rear wheel, police shield emblem, and red emergency light on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two large rear wheels, black rear panel, and two red tail lights with no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the police shield emblem, sloped roof, and exposed front suspension.
attribute_police_markings: A police shield emblem is visible on both side doors, featuring a yellow and black color scheme. No large 'POLICE' text or department names are visible. The shield is placed centrally on the door panels.
attribute_emergency_lights: A single small red emergency light is mounted on the top front of the roof. No roof-mounted light bar or additional grille/rear lights are visible.
attribute_police_insignia: Police shield emblems are present on both side doors, colored yellow and black, with a classic badge shape.
